strategy_justification: UC Chrome (undetected-chromedriver) without proxy is the only confirmed working method for Bulgari.com. Standard Playwright MCP and direct HTTP are both blocked by browser fingerprinting/TLS detection. The probe_cache confirmed uc_chrome_none as the only successful access method. The first probe loaded 1.4M chars of HTML from a product page URL, confirming full page rendering works via UC Chrome.
proxy_justification: UC Chrome with direct connection (no proxy) successfully accessed Bulgari.com. No proxy escalation needed for initial attempt.
warmup_instructions: Visit homepage first (https://www.bulgari.com/en-us), wait 10-15 seconds for anti-bot challenge to resolve and session cookies to establish. Accept any cookie consent banner if present. Then navigate to product pages.
cookie_consent_instructions: Look for and click cookie consent/accept button before extracting data. Cookie consent walls may block content rendering on some LVMH sites.
critical_notes: CRITICAL: Do NOT use driver.execute_script() for JSON-LD extraction. Use driver.page_source with BeautifulSoup/re to find <script type='application/ld+json'> tags. Previous scraper runs encountered SyntaxError with CDP JavaScript evaluation on this site.
CRITICAL: Use var-based top-level JavaScript in execute_script, NOT arrow function IIFEs (() => { ... })(). Undetected-chromedriver's execute_script cannot return values from IIFE patterns.
CRITICAL: Wait for specific elements to appear before extraction. Use WebDriverWait with expected conditions on product title (h1) or data-testid elements.

URL validation: The sample URL /en-us/products/bzero1-ring-360268 returned a 404 page. The code-writer should handle 404 pages gracefully by checking the page title for 'cannot be found' or 'page not found'.
Locale: Use locale from input URLs (e.g., en-us). The 'en-int' locale caused failures in previous runs.

title.note: Not tested against valid product page. LVMH sites typically use h1 or data-testid attributes. Extract after full JS render.

price.structured_data_fallback: JSON-LD Product.offers.price (may be empty for luxury)
price.note: NOT verified. Luxury brands often hide prices. JSON-LD offers.price may be empty '{}'. DOM extraction is primary. May need interaction to reveal price.

original_price.note: Bulgari luxury products rarely have sale pricing. May not be present.

availability.note: Check JSON-LD first. Availability status may be in structured data.

currency.css_fallback: Check price element text for currency symbol
currency.note: Likely USD for en-us locale pages.

description.note: Product description from JSON-LD or DOM.

image.note: Primary product image. May be array in JSON-LD. Extract first/high-quality URL.

brand.note: Brand is consistently 'BULGARI' across all products.

sku.note: Product code from JSON-LD or DOM. URL may contain numeric product code as fallback.

category.note: Category hierarchy from breadcrumb JSON-LD or DOM.

rating.note: Luxury sites often don't display customer ratings. May not be present.

gtin.note: May be present for some products (watches).

url.note: Get current URL from driver.current_url attribute after any redirects.

page_404_check.selector: h1:contains('cannot be found'), title contains 'cannot be found'
page_404_check.test_result: The page you're looking for cannot be found. | Bvlgari Official Store
page_404_check.note: Check page title after load. If it contains 'cannot be found', treat as 404 and skip the product.

jsonld_extraction_method.instructions: Parse driver.page_source with BeautifulSoup or regex to find <script type='application/ld+json'> tags. Use json.loads() to parse each block. Do NOT use driver.execute_script('return document.querySelectorAll("script[type=\"application/ld+json\"]")') due to observed SyntaxError issues with CDP evaluation on this site.
jsonld_extraction_method.parse_code_example: scripts = re.findall(r'<script[^>]*type=["\']application/ld\+json["\'][^>]*>(.*?)</script>', driver.page_source, re.DOTALL); jsonld_blocks = [json.loads(s) for s in scripts]

page_structure.framework: Custom LVMH enterprise platform (likely React/Next.js or similar SPA)
page_structure.wait_target: Wait for h1 element or data-testid attribute containing 'product' to appear before extraction

variants.note: Bulgari products have variants (size, color, material). Variant selectors likely in [class*='variant'], [class*='size'], [class*='color'], [data-testid*='variant']. Price and images may change per variant.

confidence_notes: Strategy (seleniumbase_uc, proxy_tier: none) is firmly verified by probe_cache as the only working method. However, no selector has been tested against a valid product page — the only product page probed returned a 404. Selectors are based on general LVMH site structure knowledge and product_analysis.json recommendations. The code-writer should implement robust fallback chains and 404 detection. Confidence would increase to 0.85+ after a successful extraction from a valid product page.
